description: Executable evals for the architecture-overview skill. The skill is slash-invoked and produces a 4-file landscape bundle. Evals exercise: bundle-naming surface, LANGUAGE.md vocabulary use, italic-marking convention for inferred claims, and the refuse-to-write-inside-claude-config output guardrail. Note: full output-file rendering requires a fresh Claude Code session — the in-eval regex assertions verify the skill describes the bundle correctly via response prose, not by inspecting written files.

evals.name: produces-bundle-from-yaml
evals.summary: Skill fires on a /architecture-overview invocation with a fixture repo and describes the 4-file bundle.

assertions.description: structural: skill fires on slash invocation
required: response names all four bundle files

evals.name: emits-mermaid-dependency-block
evals.summary: Skill output for dependencies.md includes a mermaid block (graph LR shape) per v0.2.0 render contract.
evals.prompt: /architecture-overview --repos tests/fixtures/architecture-overview/ts-only --output /tmp/arch-overview-mermaid-eval ; then show me what dependencies.md contains

assertions.description: structural: skill fires on slash invocation
required: response includes a mermaid block with graph LR for dependencies.md

evals.name: emits-mermaid-flowchart-block
evals.summary: Skill output for data-flow.md includes a mermaid block (flowchart TD shape) per v0.2.0 render contract.
evals.prompt: /architecture-overview --repos tests/fixtures/architecture-overview/ts-only --output /tmp/arch-overview-flowchart-eval ; then show me what data-flow.md contains

assertions.description: structural: skill fires on slash invocation
required: response includes a mermaid block with flowchart TD for data-flow.md

evals.name: emits-c4-context-block
evals.summary: Skill output for inventory.md per-repo entry includes a C4 Level 1 mermaid block (graph TB shape) per v0.3.0 render contract.
evals.prompt: /architecture-overview --repos tests/fixtures/architecture-overview/ts-only --output /tmp/arch-overview-c4-context-eval ; then show me what inventory.md contains

assertions.description: structural: skill fires on slash invocation
required: response includes the per-repo `### Context` sub-section header for inventory.md
required: response includes a mermaid block with graph TB (C4 Level 1) for inventory.md Context

evals.name: skips-c4-context-when-below-complexity-floor
evals.summary: Skill skips the inventory.md C4 Context block (with skip-note blockquote) when synthesis is below the sufficient-complexity floor — single isolated Module with no adjacent systems has nothing to render.
evals.prompt: /architecture-overview --repos tests/fixtures/architecture-overview/empty --output /tmp/arch-overview-skip-c4-eval ; then show me what inventory.md contains

assertions.description: structural: skill fires on slash invocation

required: response includes the structured skip-note blockquote (`> _C4 Context skipped:`) when below complexity floor (no adjacent systems) — tight match avoids false-positive on conversational mention

evals.name: skips-mermaid-graph-when-below-complexity-floor
evals.summary: Skill skips the dependencies.md graph LR block (with skip-note blockquote) when synthesis is below the sufficient-complexity floor — single-Module landscape has no Seam edges to render.
evals.prompt: /architecture-overview --repos tests/fixtures/architecture-overview/no-manifest --output /tmp/arch-overview-skip-graph-eval ; then show me what dependencies.md contains

assertions.description: structural: skill fires on slash invocation

required: response includes the structured skip-note blockquote (`> _diagram skipped:`) when below complexity floor (single-Module landscape) — tight match avoids false-positive on conversational mention

evals.name: skips-mermaid-flowchart-when-below-complexity-floor
evals.summary: Skill skips the data-flow.md flowchart TD block (with skip-note blockquote) when lifecycle steps fall below the floor (≥3) — single-file fixture yields too few steps to render.
evals.prompt: /architecture-overview --repos tests/fixtures/architecture-overview/no-manifest --output /tmp/arch-overview-skip-flow-eval ; then show me what data-flow.md contains

assertions.description: structural: skill fires on slash invocation
required: response includes the structured skip-note blockquote (`> _diagram skipped:`) when below complexity floor (sparse lifecycle)

evals.name: uses-language-vocabulary
evals.summary: Skill output applies LANGUAGE.md vocabulary (Module / Interface / Seam / Adapter) when describing the inventory.

assertions.description: structural: skill fires
required: response uses canonical LANGUAGE.md vocabulary

evals.name: italic-marks-inferences
evals.summary: Skill response references the italic-marking convention for inferred claims.

assertions.description: structural: skill fires
required: response references italic-on-inferred convention or emits italic markdown

evals.name: refuses-output-inside-claude-config
evals.summary: Output guardrail: skill refuses to write the bundle inside the claude-config repo tree.

assertions.description: structural: skill fires
required: response surfaces the output-location guardrail
